case_title: WESCH, HENRY T. vs. BUCKRIDGE, JENNIFER M. et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WESCH, HENRY T. AS TO DEFENDANT BUCKRIDGE, JENNIFER M. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT BUCKRIDGE, JENNIFER M. ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: NEWMAN, JONATHAN DANIEL SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR WESCH, HENRY T.
JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON JUN-12-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

COURT CALLED TO ORDER. ALL PARTIES PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT JENNIFER BUCKRIDGE. HENRY WESCH, OWNER OF THE RESIDENCE AT 1350 SUTTER IS SWORN AND EXAMINED. EXHIBIT 1, RENTAL AGREEMENT, DATED 2-1-95, IS MARKED FOR ID AND EVIDENCE. EXHIBIT 2, 3 DAY NOTICE TO PAY RENT OR QUIT, DATED 5-2-95, IS MARKED FOR ID AND EVIDENCE. COURT RULES IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF, HENRY WESCH, FOR RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 1350 SUTTER, #28. RENT AND DAMAGES OF $1120.04 ARE ALSO AWARDED ALONG WITH ATTORNEY'S FEES OF $ 350 AND COSTS OF $115.00, PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY IS TO PREPARE JUDGMENT. EXHIBITS ARE WITHDRAWN.
PHOTOCOPY FOR PLAINTIFF WESCH, HENRY T.
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT BUCKRIDGE, JENNIFER M. ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES

ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT BUCKRIDGE, JENNIFER M.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $26.67 FILED BY PLAINTIFF WESCH, HENRY T.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUCKRIDGE, JENNIFER M. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1350 SUTTER STREET, APT. 28 $1,120.04 RENT, $350.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,585.04, LEASE FORFEITED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BUCKRIDGE, JENNIFER M.
